attempted to use them in the system.
- If Varsha Lagnesh (Ascendant Lord of the Year) falls in 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th, 7th or 9th,
then there is wealth, happiness, etc. and progress during that year.
- If the Varsha Lagnesh is in 3rd, 10th or 11th bhavas, the native gets benefits by
undergoing hardships; giving mixed results.
- If Varsha Lagnesh is in 6th, 8th or 12th bhava, that year is detrimental to happiness
and there will be destruction and loss of property and fortune.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
6

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
- If Varsha Lagnesh is conjunct or aspected by benefics, there will be wealth,
Learning and gains, luxuries and happiness.
